headlines.headline: Zrovov Advisors secures $180M contract with a global retailer

sentiment.reasoning: The $180M contract provides a clear, quantifiable revenue boost that will positively impact the company's financial performance over the next 100 days.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
